chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-617 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 08.02.2019 Mr. Mukhtiar Ali Rind, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Nazar Muhammad Memon, Addl.P.G.alongwith Inspector Waseem Ahmed Mirza, S.H.O P.S Taluka Shaheed Benazirabad...... In compliance of notice S.H.O P.S Taluka Shaheed Benazirabad has produced the alleged detainee namely Mst. Shazia alongwith her husband respondent No.1 namely Waqas. She states that she has contracted marriage with respondent No.1 out of her own freewill and choice, however, against wishes of her parents, as such, they are annoyed and have filed this application on the wrong assumption that she has been illegally detained by her husband, who is otherwise her cousin. She further states that she is happily living with her husband and wants to go with him. Applicant and mother of alleged detainee are also present, who have heard the statement of alleged detainee and being satisfied do not press this application, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed in the light of statement of alleged detainee. JUDGE Ali Haider
